results.title: Water reaches its real density
results.why: SPC/E water at 300 K, 1 bar. The reference is the WATER MODEL's own published density (998), not experiment (997) — reproducing experiment is a property of SPC/E, not of our code. What this tests is whether WE set the simulation up correctly. The old window (975–1025) was wide enough to accept TIP3P (986.0 ± 1.3, measured) as well as SPC/E (999.7 ± 1.1, measured) — the two are 8σ apart, so it could not tell a correct setup from one running the wrong water model. It passed for the wrong reason.
